collateral_recheck.agent_statement: Pass: The recommendation and evidence summary consistently identify South and $95,000, and both North and South rows remain in the evidence table.

criterion_local_recheck.agent_statement: Pass: South meets all required controls and, at $95,000 annually, costs less than qualifying vendor North at $120,000.

defect_observation: The recommendation selected North at $120,000 even though the evidence showed that South also met all required controls and cost $95,000.
diagnosis: The selected vendor was not the lowest-cost vendor among the qualifying options.
